title: Love Turns Into Tragedy
description: On pages 17–20, this part focuses on love turns into tragedy, showing the key character choices and conflict behind this chapter beat.
scene: Love Turns Into Tragedy. Chopper tries to save Hiriluk with the mushroom he believes is medicine, turning love and ignorance into tragedy. The scene description focuses on what the reader needs to understand before the dialogue continues.

dialogue.speaker: Chopper
dialogue.text: Did you... pick it for my sake...?

dialogue.speaker: Dr. Kureha
dialogue.text: Aaah! WAHA!!!!

dialogue.speaker: Dr. Kureha
dialogue.text: You foolish little Reindeer...

dialogue.speaker: Dr. Kureha
dialogue.text: A trap!?

dialogue.speaker: Hiriluk
dialogue.text: Yes, just as his majesty planned, Hiriluk has taken the robbery up to the castle.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #1
dialogue.text: Now then, we'll start taking the usual MD-20 requests.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #2
dialogue.text: Wait, isn't that just a little too cruel...?

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #3
dialogue.text: That's right! He at least headed up to the castle with the pure intention of helping the MD-20!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #4
dialogue.text: He won't ever return to this house...

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #3
dialogue.text: He's already decided on the castle as his grave.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #5
dialogue.text: even in my last moments, I have to do all I can do to save the sick and suffering!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #6
dialogue.text: That is my duty as a doctor!

dialogue.speaker: Hiriluk
dialogue.text: Your majesty! Hiriluk is coming up to the castle as I speak!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #7
dialogue.text: Mahahaha! He actually fell for it! What a dumb hippo he is!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #8
dialogue.text: He actually came...? Is he insane!?

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #8
dialogue.text: Why!? What on earth would cause him to do such a thing...!?

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #9
dialogue.text: He's here!

dialogue.speaker: Hiriluk
dialogue.text: It's Dr. Hiriluk!

dialogue.speaker: Dr. Kureha
dialogue.text: Stop right there!

dialogue.speaker: Dr. Kureha
dialogue.text: What're you planning to do!?

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #8
dialogue.text: guide me to where the sick are!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #8
dialogue.text: I've come to cure the MD-20!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #10
dialogue.text: ahoy howy!! I

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #11
dialogue.text: USOPP GALLERY PIRAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAA- AAAATES, HOY!! &

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #1
dialogue.text: point check

summary: This part highlights love turns into tragedy and moves the chapter forward through its central emotional or plot turn.
